title: SV: Parameterised module names not always contain interface parameters.

features.name: parameterized interface with modport
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface with modport declarations, where the interface has a width parameter and defines two modports with different signal directions

features.name: module with parameterized interface port
features.description: Code should include a module that has a parameterized interface as a port, using a specific modport of that interface

features.name: multiple instances of module with interface port
features.description: Code should include two instances of the same parameterized module, each connected to a different interface instance of the same parameterized interface type
